task_objective: Implement the revised status bar diagnostics plan by restoring a green frontend baseline, adding status provenance, separating BrowserView and React diagnostic surfaces, and keeping routine autosync progress/results out of Decky toasts.
design_decisions: Every status publish now carries a source label and optional game, app ID, tracked, result, and surface metadata.
BrowserView creation now prefers Router.WindowStore.GamepadUIMainWindowInstance.CreateBrowserView before SteamClient.BrowserView.Create.
The debug button cycles BrowserView-only, React-only, and combined diagnostic surfaces with distinct labels.
Routine autosync progress and success states no longer emit Decky toasts; failures still route through the notification-aware toast helper.
EUIComposition.Notification is only requested from the mounted React status component when the React surface is active.
